title: Irresistibly Crisp Italian Flour Focaccia
description: A crispy and cozy Italian dish featuring plain flour and a mirepoix base, perfect for a satisfying snack or side dish. This recipe is onion and garlic free, making it friendly for all palates.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Add the olive oil, diced carrots, and diced celery to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a rectangle.
Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the focaccia from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
